## Anti-cheat / privacy implications

<!--
This app sits in a sensitive intersection — it reads game state, talks over the network, and computes proximity. Features that look innocuous can leak information or shift the threat model. If your proposal touches any of:

- What enemies you can hear (range, conditions)
- What data the client sends or receives
- How positions / volumes flow through the system

…please briefly note how the feature interacts with docs/threat-model.md. If you're not sure, leave it blank and we'll talk through it.
-->
